## Promotion checklist (end-of-run)
- [ ] Promoted stable knowledge into `memory:*` issue(s)
- [ ] Updated relevant index issue(s)
- [ ] Marked run as `status:done` or `status:blocked` with clear asks

## Final summary
Outcome, what changed, what to do next.
